ogTitle: Keiraville vs Kellys Plains: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Keiraville and Kellys Plains.
heading: Keiraville vs Kellys Plains — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Keiraville, New South Wales and Kellys Plains, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Keiraville has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Kellys Plains (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Keiraville or Kellys Plains safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Keiraville has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Kellys Plains scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Keiraville scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Kellys Plains scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Keiraville or Kellys Plains?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Keiraville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
